description: An ISR planner must create a flight plan for a surveillance drone to cover multiple intelligence collection targets.

nodes.task_description: Input the coordinates and priority of all intelligence collection targets.

expected_outcome.expected: Planner accurately enters all target information.

nodes.task_description: Generate an optimal flight path that covers all targets while minimizing flight time and exposure to threats.

expected_outcome.expected: Planner creates an efficient and safe flight plan.

nodes.task_description: Task the drone with the finalized flight plan and sensor collection settings.

expected_outcome.expected: Planner successfully sends the mission plan to the drone control station.
